description: A debate on the merits of non-custodial wallets featuring Nass Eddequiouaq and Brian Friel. The discussion explores the spectrum of custody versus self-custody, the role of wallet providers, and the onboarding of users to crypto through exchanges and wallets. Key points include the importance of user control and the evolution of wallet technology.
topic_summary: Debate on whether non-custodial wallets are overrated, focusing on custody dynamics, user onboarding, and wallet provider roles in the crypto ecosystem. [t=3:44] Introduction by Sagar. [t=4:64] Opening remarks by Nass. [t=90:21] Discussion on wallet adoption and user control.
